data.title: Bitfarms Shareholders Approve U.S. Redomiciliation Plan
data.description: Expected completion of U.S. redomiciliation and rebranding to Keel Infrastructure is projected around April 1, 2026. The process is on schedule with no delays, and all necessary steps are being taken accordingly to meet the set deadline. This transition marks a significant move for the company as it repositions itself in the market.
FiEE, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results

data.title: Jimmy Dunn Recognized for Leadership as American Cancer Society's Shuck Cancer Event Surpasses $1 million
data.description: First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN) based in New Orleans has disclosed that its New Orleans Market President, Jimmy Dunn, has been recognized by the American Cancer Society (ACS) with the prestigious 2025 Event of the Year Award. Dunn received this honor for his exceptional leadership as the chair of a significant event.

data.title: Evolus Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Evolus, Inc., a performance beauty company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol EOLS, recently disclosed the grant in March 2026 of 85,516 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 8,635 stock options of its common stock to 10 new non-executive employees. The compensation committee of the company’s board of directors sanctioned these awards under the 2023 Inducement Plan.

data.title: ReposiTrak, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Salt Lake City-based ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK), a leading global food traceability and regulatory compliance network, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per quarter ($0.08 annually) for shareholders on record as of March 31, 2026. Shareholders will receive the cash dividends around May 15, 2026. Future dividends will be paid within 45 days of each fiscal quarter.

data.title: Capital One Financial Corporation to Webcast Conference Call on First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: On April 21, 2026, at 4:05 p.m. ET, Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) will announce its Q1 2026 earnings. A conference call to discuss financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, will be held at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The call will be live webcasted, and the earnings release will be on the company’s website at www.capitalone.com. A replay of the call will be available following the event.
QATAR FOREIGN MINISTRY CONDEMNS ISRAELI STRIKE ON SOUTHERN SYRIA

data.title: Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service Inc. Announces Full Year 2025 Results and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: In Irvine, California, on March 20, 2026, Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service Inc. (referred to as "Cheetah" or the "Company") listed on Nasdaq CM as CTNT, revealed its financial outcomes for the year closing on December 31, 2025, and delivered a corporate status update.

data.title: Crypto firms: 75% of institutions to boost digital asset investments, favoring Bitcoin, Ether, stablecoins, and tokens.
data.description: This year, approximately 75% of institutional investors intend to boost their digital asset allocations. Among the most popular choices for investment are Bitcoin, Ether, stablecoins, and tokenized assets.

data.title: BridgeBio Pharma Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 18, 2026, BridgeBio Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBIO) based in Palo Alto, California, revealed that 29 new employees were granted equity in the form of restricted stock units. This totals to 70,916 shares of the company's common stock. The vesting schedule for these equity grants states that one-fourth of the shares for each employee will vest on February 16, 2027, with the remaining shares vesting on a quarterly basis thereafter. However, this is subject to the condition that each employee remains employed with BridgeBio or one of its subsidiaries on the specified vesting dates.
argenx schedules Annual General Meeting for May 6, 2026.

data.title: Bruce Cardenas Shares His Leadership Philosophy Behind Building Impactful Brands in New Book, Lead With Value
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 20, 2026, the renowned executive Bruce Cardenas unveiled his latest book, "Lead With Value: A Blueprint for Leading with Purpose and Impact." Boasting a diverse career encompassing various roles in service, entrepreneurship, and leadership within rapidly-expanding enterprises, Cardenas has garnered significant attention for this new release. The book delves into strategies for leading effectively, emphasizing the importance of purpose and impact in leadership roles. Cardenas' insightful guidance is drawn from his extensive experience and success in navigating high-growth ventures.

data.title: HADRIAN OPENS ADVANCED MANUFACTURING FACILITY IN ALABAMA TO SUPPORT COLUMBIA- AND VIRGINIA-CLASS SUBMARINE PRODUCTION
data.description: Secretary of the Navy Phelan, along with Rep. Aderholt, Rep. Rogers, Sen. Wicker, Sen. Britt, and Sen. Tuberville, gathered to participate in the ribbon-cutting ceremony for a newly constructed public-private facility in Cherokee, Alabama. This cutting-edge facility, costing $2.4 billion, marks a significant investment in the area's infrastructure and economic development. The event took place on March 20, 2026, and showcased the commitment of Hadrian, an advanced manufacturing company, towards enhancing local opportunities and growth in Cherokee.
S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite register their biggest four-week percentage losses since the four weeks ended April 18th.
The Russell 2000 ends 10.3% below the record closing high reached on January 22, confirming the index has been in a correction since that date.
